esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-tomcat.otel-*
| WHERE java_lang_Memory_HeapMemoryUsage_used IS NOT NULL
    AND java_lang_Memory_HeapMemoryUsage_max IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    heap_used = MAX(java_lang_Memory_HeapMemoryUsage_used),
    heap_max = MAX(java_lang_Memory_HeapMemoryUsage_max)
  BY host.name
// HeapMemoryUsage_max can be -1 if undefined; filter to valid values
| WHERE heap_max > 0
| EVAL heap_pct = ROUND(heap_used / heap_max * 100.0, 2)
// Heap utilisation threshold — peaks above 85% indicate memory pressure
// Sustained high utilisation often precedes OutOfMemoryError
| WHERE heap_pct > 85.0
| SORT heap_pct DESC
